"""Custom exceptions for the order processing system."""

class InvalidItemError(Exception):

Content of src/order_processing.py:


"""Order processing module."""

import logging
from typing import List, Dict, Any, Union

from custom_exceptions import InvalidItemError

# Set up logging
log_file = "logs/order_processing.log"
logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.INFO,
    format="%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(message)s",
    handlers=[
        logging.FileHandler(log_file),
        logging.StreamHandler()
    ]
)

Content of run_tests.py:


import unittest
import sys

print("Running tests...")
sys.path.insert(0, './src')
print(f"Python path: {sys.path}")

if __name__ == '__main__':
    print("Discovering tests...")
    loader = unittest.TestLoader()
    suite = loader.discover('tests')
    print(f"Found {suite.countTestCases()} tests.")
    runner = unittest.TextTestRunner()
    print("Running test suite...")
    runner.run(suite)
    print("Tests finished.")
